# D3keyHelperForLinux v1.0.10

This release fixes a bug where items placed in safezone slots could be accidentally salvaged/abandoned when 2-tall items overflowed into adjacent non-safezone slots.

## Bug Fix: safezone overflow protection

**Problem**: In Diablo III, some items occupy 2 inventory slots vertically. When a 2-tall item is placed in a safezone slot (e.g. slot 11), its lower half is visually present in the slot directly below (e.g. slot 21). If slot 21 is not in the safezone, the helper would right-click it — picking up and processing the item anchored at the safezone slot.

This was most visible with 3 consecutive safezone slots in the same row (e.g. `1,2,3,11,12,13,48,49,50,58,59,60`): items in row 2 (slots 11–13) overflowed into row 3 (slots 21–23), causing all three to be processed together.

**Fix**: `scan_inventory_space` now detects whether a safezone slot itself contains an item. If it does, the slot directly below (vertical overflow) and the slot immediately to the right in the same row (horizontal overflow) are also marked as protected, preventing the helper from touching them.

---

## 修复：安全格溢出保护

**问题**：暗黑3中部分物品会占用竖向两个格子。当这类物品放置在安全格（例如格子11）时，其下半部分会视觉上出现在正下方的格子（例如格子21）中。如果格子21不在安全格列表里，辅助程序会右键点击它，从而拿起并处理原本锚定在安全格的物品。

当同一行有3个连续安全格时（如 `1,2,3,11,12,13,48,49,50,58,59,60`）表现最明显：第2行（格子11–13）的物品溢出到第3行（格子21–23），导致三个物品同时被处理。

**修复**：`scan_inventory_space` 现在会检测安全格本身是否存放了物品。若有，则将正下方的格子（竖向溢出）和同行右侧相邻格子（横向溢出）也标记为保护状态，防止辅助程序触碰它们。
